title: Mora's Cat Scratcher PLUS
description:
Meet Mora — a confident little black cat with a crown, a collection of shiny treasures, and a paw that just will NOT

stay still.

Mora's Cat Scratcher PLUS is a cozy, satisfying tap-and-scratch game built for short play sessions and long obsessions. Help Mora dig into her scratching posts, uncover sparkling gems, unlock cute cosmetics, and discover what she's hiding under all that purring.

WHAT'S IN THE GAME

 - One-finger / one-click play — easy to pick up, hard to put down

 - Dozens of collectible treasures to scratch loose

 - Unlockable Mora outfits, crowns, and bows

 - Relaxing music and oddly satisfying scratch sound design

 - Achievement-style milestones that reward consistent play

 - Brand new PLUS-exclusive content not in earlier versions

WHO IT'S FOR

 - Cat people (obviously)

 - Players who love cozy, low-stress casual games

 - Anyone who wants something calm to play between bigger games

 - Streamers looking for a charming chill game for chat to enjoy

Mora is the official cat mascot of Cat & Fox Studios — a tiny

independent studio focused on warm, cozy, AI-assisted games

starring original characters. Mora's Cat Scratcher PLUS is her

Steam debut.

Settle in, give her a scratch, and see what shows up.
description_short: Meet Mora — a confident little black cat with a crown and a paw that won't stay still. Scratch, dig, and uncover sparkling treasures in a cozy tap-and-collect game built for relaxed play. Unlock outfits, crowns, and PLUS-exclusive content in Mora's Steam debut.
